name: always
description: Universal standards for every request: Purpose, Priority, Standards, Usage, plus clarity, safety, git restraint, and verification.

name: python
description: Python standards for imports, typing, logging, errors, configuration, tests, and static analysis.

name: shell
description: Bash and zsh standards for structure, strict mode, quoting, traps, Bats tests, and safe scripting.

name: lua
description: Lua standards from the LuaRocks style guide for modules, locals, errors, LDoc, tables, luacheck, and tests.

name: typescript
description: TypeScript and JavaScript standards for strict typing, modules, async, errors, tests, and tooling.
